# Forward Projections {#sec-forwardprojections}

```{r}
#| include: false
rnorm(5)
OM <- readRDS('../objects/OM/Base Case.om')
```

> This chapter is incomplete

## Specifications

- Number of projection years: `r OM@nYear` 
- Management interval: **TBD**

## Generation of Simulated Fishery Data 


## Implementation of Management Advice
